channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Someone is repeatedly not cleaning up dog mess in Cottage Field Close. The sane dog appears to have fouled at the 269 bus stop on Foots Cray Lane., 7th March
item.description:
From the colour of the dog waste size and colour, it would appear to be caused by the same dog. Unfortunately, I haven't seen either the dog or the owner. Fouling has occurred at least 5 times and it is still on the pavement. Some trodden in.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Cottage Field Close, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface failed - large potholes and craters, 7th March
item.description:
As above
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garside Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 7th March
item.description:
Deals Gateway junction of Deptford Bridge Remove flypostering from traffic lights

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deptford Bridge, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very long deep rut, 7th March
item.description:
Very long deep rut on edge of road which is breaking up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waldens Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 7th March
item.description:
Deals Gateway Remove flypostering from cable box by bus turn around

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deptford Bridge, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Island v badly damaged, 7th March
item.description:
Traffic island at top of White Horse Hill has been very badly damaged - seemingly burnt out? - either last night or this morning and needs repair. Please expedite ax used daily by school children and visitors to the High Street. This is now the second traffic island in a short stretch on White Horse Hill that has been badly damaged in a short period. Greater road safety measures are required please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Edge of road breaking up, 7th March
item.description:
Edge of road breaking up leaving a very long, deep rut

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waldens Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 7th March
item.description:
Deals Gateway by the bus turn around. Remove flypostering from black box possibly a traffic light control box

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deptford Bridge, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 7th March
item.description:

item.title: Shopping Trolleys left around Charlton Train station, 7th March
item.description:
There are several shopping trolleys abandoned - please sort this out. There should be a fee so people stop doing it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several large gear bags dumped, 7th March
item.description:
Dumped in a usual fly tipping spot. Many other large gear bags also dumped nearby on Herbert Road next to litter bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded plastic bottles which appear to contain urine, 7th March
item.description:
Potential health hazard from contents of bottles. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elstree Hill, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
